title: doctor tool-surfaces --json output
description: Machine-readable output of spec-kitty doctor tool-surfaces --json. Finding codes are stable across releases.

result.description: Whether the doctor command itself ran successfully (independent of findings).

tool_key_filter.description: The --tool filter value if provided, or null for all configured tools.

surface_kind_filter.description: The --kind filter value if provided, or null for all surface kinds.

clean.description: True when there are no findings at severity error or warning.

spec_kitty_version.description: The spec-kitty version that produced this output.

code.description: Stable finding code. Never renamed or removed without deprecation cycle.

tool_key.description: The configured tool this finding relates to (e.g., 'codex', 'claude', 'copilot').

severity.description: Severity of the finding. 'research_gap' indicates a known area not yet fully supported.

path.description: Absolute path to the affected file or directory, if applicable.

repair_command.description: The CLI command that resolves this finding. Null if no automated repair is available.
